scriptText:
NOTE:
Check detail article on taruma.substack.com.



I. PART 1

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a live-action fantasy comedy scene where @actor1 as ARTHUR, a museum custodian, touches a cursed painting and physically flattens into @image2, a 2D hand-drawn cel-shaded character.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Maintain spatial continuity between the real museum corridor and the 2D flattened character. Ensure the transformation preserves the character's relative position near the canvas. Keep the camera on a consistent axis to avoid orientation confusion.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
[AESTHETIC]
- Style: Live-action photorealism transitioning to bold, flat 2D graphic anime styling.
- Palette: Warm marble, polished mahogany wood, matte void-black, electric blue light.
- Lighting: High-contrast gallery spotlights casting long shadows.
- Wardrobe: Arthur wearing a beige heavy canvas utility duster jacket over a grey henley shirt and dark work trousers.
- Sound: Diegetic only. Fabric rustling, leather creaks, vacuum suction, static hums, paper-thin whistles, and compressed cartoon audio.
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
A high-angle, wide shot of a silent, polished marble museum corridor. Arthur stands camera-right, facing a stark matte-black canvas on a pedestal.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] Wide shot down the corridor -> [ACT] Arthur wipes a pedestal with his right hand, shoes creaking on the marble -> [AUDIO] Rhythmic duster sliding, leather shoe creaks
[CAM] Medium close-up panning left -> [ACT] He stops in front of an empty matte-black canvas labeled "The Absolute Flat" with a red "Do Not Touch" sign -> [AUDIO] Footsteps stop
[CAM] Close-up, eye-level -> [ACT] Arthur glances left and right, letting out a heavy, bored nasal huff -> [AUDIO] Bored nasal sigh
[CAM] Extreme close-up of his right index finger -> [ACT] He slowly reaches out and touches the surface of the flat black paint -> [AUDIO] Tense silence
[CAM] Close-up on the hand -> [ACT] His finger instantly loses its shadow and volume, turning into a flat inked outline -> [AUDIO] Sharp, vacuum-like "shhh-whip!" suction
[CAM] Low-angle dynamic track-in -> [ACT] He yelps "Gah!" as a vibrant blue cel-shaded light zips up his arm, flattening his sleeve -> [AUDIO] Strangled high-pitched "Gah!", high-frequency static hum
[CAM] Medium close-up, tracking his head -> [ACT] The flat vector look bleeds across his neck, turning his hair into jagged 2D spikes and his beard into clean graphic lines -> [AUDIO] Sharp marker-scratching sound
[CAM] Medium shot -> [ACT] He frantically shakes his hand, which moves with fluid anime-style smear-frame physics -> [AUDIO] Fast cartoon whip-cracks
[CAM] Point-of-view looking at a glass showcase -> [ACT] He looks at his reflection, turning to reveal he is literally paper-thin -> [AUDIO] Compressed, tinny gasp: "What the—? My... my stomach?!"
[CAM] Wide shot of the gallery -> [ACT] He spins around in panic, his razor-thin flat body slicing through the air -> [AUDIO] Whistling "woosh" sound
[CAM] Medium shot -> [ACT] He hears approaching security footsteps, panics, and dives behind a massive ancient Terracotta Warrior statue -> [AUDIO] Heavy thud-thud footsteps approaching, quick rustle
[</BRIEF>]

II. PART 2

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a live-action and hybrid animation comedy-fantasy scene, continuing from the final frame of  @video1, where ARTHUR, now a flat 2D anime-styled character, runs into an Egyptian gallery, accidentally sticks to a wall, and physically morphs into a 3D stop-motion clay puppet @image3.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Transition the physics smoothly from 2D animation rules to tactile, physical 3D stop-motion physics  @image3. Ensure the camera preserves the structural geography of the galleries. Maintain consistent lighting and shadow mapping during the material transformation.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[CONTINUITY PROTOCOL]]
Continue directly from the final frame of @video1. Maintain Arthur’s exact 2D visual appearance, including his vibrant blue eyes, thick red beard, beige utility duster jacket, blue henley shirt, and dark trousers. Retain the warm, dimly lit museum environment, keeping the lighting, textures, and comedic pacing consistent.
[[/CONTINUITY PROTOCOL]]
[[VISUAL BLOCKING]]
The scene opens with Arthur behind the Terracotta Warrior glass display, transitioning into a dynamic chase out of the frame. The blocking follows a left-to-right screen direction as he flees the main gallery, turning into the shadowy, high-contrast Egyptian exhibition hall. He retreats backward toward a stone wall camera-left, becomes adhered flat against it, and undergoes a tactile clay transformation. After peeling away, his movement vectors switch from 2D fluid smears to jerky, 12fps forward-stumbling toward the camera, ending in a frozen pose in the center-right foreground under a sweeping diagonal spotlight beam.
[[/VISUAL BLOCKING]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
Sound Atmosphere: Diegetic only. Rapid paper shuffling, tinny compressed breaths, wet suction, bubbling clay, rubbery peeling, heavy hollow thuds, ticking joints.
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
Continue from @video1
[CAM] Medium shot, tracking right -> [ACT] Arthur scrambles past the Terracotta glass case, running with a choppy, paper-thin profile -> [AUDIO] Rapid, high-speed card-shuffling fapping sound
[CAM] Low-angle wide tracking shot -> [ACT] Arthur rounds a corner from the bright corridor into a darker, quieter Egyptian gallery, chest heaving -> [AUDIO] Compressed, tinny panting: "Haa... haa... oh man, oh man..."
[CAM] Medium close-up, panning with his movement -> [ACT] He stops in the deep shadows of the Egyptian gallery, looking back over his shoulder -> [AUDIO] Deep, tinny sigh of relief: "Okay... I think I’m good."
[CAM] Full shot, low-angle -> [ACT] He relaxes his shoulders and takes three cautious steps backward without looking -> [AUDIO] Light, paper-like pitter-patter on the stone floor
[CAM] Close-up profile of the stone wall -> [ACT] His flat, paper-thin back contacts the sandstone wall -> [AUDIO] Wet, sticky suction-like SQUELCH!
[CAM] Medium shot -> [ACT] Arthur struggles, stuck flat; a ripple of matte-grey clay texture erupts from his back and quickly creeps forward over his chest -> [AUDIO] Wet clay bubbling and crawling sound
[CAM] Close-up, high-contrast -> [ACT] The heavy clay swallows his 2D duster jacket, turning the flat lines into thick, physical clay ridges as he panics: "Wait—no, no! What is this?! I’m stuck!" -> [AUDIO] Vocal pitch dropping from cartoonish to a deep, vibrating, muffled tone
[CAM] Extreme close-up on his face -> [ACT] The grey clay aggressively crawls up his neck, swallowing his flat 2D face; his eyes pop out as glossy blue glass beads, and his beard thickens into chunky clay blocks -> [AUDIO] Rubbery popping and solid squishing
[CAM] Medium wide shot -> [ACT] With a final, desperate "URGH!", he peels his heavy clay body off the wall and stumbles forward -> [AUDIO] Wet, rubbery POOP-SHUCK! detachment sound
[CAM] High-angle tracking shot -> [ACT] He stumbles forward in a jerky, 12-frames-per-second stop-motion stutter, his heavy clay feet stomping the floor -> [AUDIO] Solid, dead, heavy clay "THUD-THUD" footsteps
[CAM] Medium close-up, low-angle -> [ACT] A bright, harsh security flashlight beam sweeps across his face; Arthur instantly freezes in a rigid, wide-eyed pose -> [AUDIO] Faint mechanical ticking of clay joints
[</BRIEF>]

Rhythmic duster sliding, leather shoe creaks
Extreme close-up of his right index finger
He slowly reaches out and touches the surface of the flat black paint

He frantically shakes his hand, which moves with fluid anime-style smear-frame physics

He spins around in panic, his razor-thin flat body slicing through the air

Arthur rounds a corner from the bright corridor into a darker, quieter Egyptian gallery, chest heaving
Haa... haa... oh man, oh man...
Medium close-up, panning with his movement
He stops in the deep shadows of the Egyptian gallery, looking back over his shoulder
He relaxes his shoulders and takes three cautious steps backward without looking
Light, paper-like pitter-patter on the stone floor
Close-up profile of the stone wall
His flat, paper-thin back contacts the sandstone wall
a ripple of matte-grey clay texture erupts from his back and quickly creeps forward over his chest
Wet clay bubbling and crawling sound
The heavy clay swallows his 2D duster jacket, turning the flat lines into thick, physical clay ridges

cues.speaker: Arthur
cues.selectedText: Wait—no, no! What is this?! I’m stuck!
Vocal pitch dropping from cartoonish to a deep, vibrating, muffled tone
The grey clay aggressively crawls up his neck, swallowing his flat 2D face; his eyes pop out as glossy blue glass beads, and his beard thickens into chunky clay blocks
With a final, desperate "URGH!", he peels his heavy clay body off the wall and stumbles forward
He stumbles forward in a jerky, 12-frames-per-second stop-motion stutter, his heavy clay feet stomping the floor
A bright, harsh security flashlight beam sweeps across his face; Arthur instantly freezes in a rigid, wide-eyed pose
Faint mechanical ticking of clay joints
